description_long: This rifle features a robust, dark metal receiver and barrel, paired with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, giving it a classic, utilitarian appearance. The barrel is relatively thick and extends forward with a simple cylindrical profile, ending in a plain muzzle. The wooden stock and foregrip have a rich, reddish-brown hue, contrasting with the matte black finish of the metal components. A detachable box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, and the trigger guard is prominent. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the barrel and receiver, providing basic aiming capability. The overall design suggests a mid-20th-century military or police firearm, suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a dark metal barrel and receiver, complemented by a reddish-brown wooden stock and foregrip. It features a detachable box magazine and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metal barrel, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel; minimal detail of the stock and magazine visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden stock, metal barrel, and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the top of the receiver; barrel appears foreshortened.
